prompt:
Full-body fashion editorial of a confident model sitting casually on a concrete ledge, relaxed pose, direct gaze. Wearing denim jacket, white t-shirt, neutral shorts, bright socks, sneakers. Wind adds subtle motion. Beside them, a bold cartoon dragon (thick outlines, neon blue/green/yellow, playful yet powerful) interacts naturally.
Bright urban outdoor setting, blue sky, strong sunlight, crisp shadows. Mixed-media style blending photorealism and illustration with doodles, arrows, and motion graphics. High contrast, HDR, ultra-detailed, 8K.
